description:
This quiz assesses knowledge of modern CSS concepts and practical usage, gauging both fundamental and advanced skills through multiple‑choice questions. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering a light‑hearted, encouraging tone that motivates learners to consider CSS as a resume‑worthy skill. The quiz aims to both test and reinforce understanding while keeping the experience engaging.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, Modern layout techniques (Flexbox, Grid), Responsive design, CSS selectors and specificity, Best practices and performance
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and anyone looking to validate or improve their CSS proficiency for professional portfolios.
